goal_summary: The patient wanted to reschedule a Monday appointment to Wednesday and successfully rescheduled it to July 1 at 10:30AM.

bugs_found.evidence: July 1 at 10:30AM in Nashville with du v

summary: The patient called to reschedule an appointment from Monday to Wednesday. Despite some unclear speech and fragmented agent responses, the appointment was successfully rescheduled to July 1 at 10:30AM. Several bugs were identified, including identity verification bypass and mispronunciation of a doctor's name.
